name: @cloudflare/agents-push-notifications
description: Push notifications with Cloudflare Agents — reminders that work even when the tab is closed

scripts.generate-vapid-keys:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path='.env';crypto.subtle.generateKey({name:'ECDSA',namedCurve:'P-256'},true,['sign']).then(async k=>{const pub=new Uint8Array(await crypto.subtle.exportKey('raw',k.publicKey));const priv=await crypto.subtle.exportKey('jwk',k.privateKey);const b64=b=>btoa(String.fromCharCode(...b)).replace(/\+/g,'-').replace(///g,'_').replace(/=+$/g,'');const pubKey=b64(pub),privKey=priv.d;let lines=fs.existsSync(path)?fs.readFileSync(path,'utf8').split('
'):['VAPID_SUBJECT=mailto:you@example.com'];const set=(k,v)=>{const i=lines.findIndex(l=>l.startsWith(k+'='));if(i>=0)lines[i]=k+'='+v;else lines.push(k+'='+v)};set('VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY',pubKey);set('VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY',privKey);fs.writeFileSync(path,lines.join('
')+'
');console.log('Wrote VAPID keys to .env')})"
